# Material Inventory

_Produced in Phase 0 (Intake & material scan). Lives at `doc/inception/analysis/material-inventory.md`. Maps every user-provided input under `doc/inception/inputs/` to the inception phase it informs, and extracts the key elements/concepts from each._

## Inputs
| File | Type | Source | Summary | Informs phase | Key elements / concepts |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|

_Input types: strategy docs, user research, competitive analysis, existing documentation, meeting notes, prototypes/wireframes, technical docs, business model._

## Coverage gaps
_What is missing per phase — which phases have little or no supporting input, and what should be requested._
| Phase | Gap | Action |
|---|---|---|
